title: Free Energy Power Amplifier - 1
description: As I was looking around at various bits and pieces i came up with two names of interest - Greenleaf Whitear Pickard and Wesley Gary. Pickard doesn't have any patents but he was working on crystal radios and he was trying to amplify the signal and what he came up with was truely astounding. Gary has a patent and it is patent number 190206 well worth a look. As i was thinking about this i saw something gotoluc has been working on for a couple of years and it is very similar. So i knocked up this little experiment this afternoon and thought i'd share - it's very very interesting as it seems to amplify the actual power - that is the ability of the machine to do work without any extra power input - is this the way to free energy? - i don't know but it really looks promising. For anybody interested i have just set up a website - it's new - so not so good - but i'm getting there - the address is https://sites.google.com/site/aferlab/
